evals.prompt: Analyze this VictoriaMetrics query trace and tell me what's slow
evals.expected_output: Structured performance report identifying rollup computation as the bottleneck, with time breakdown, data volume stats, per-storage-node breakdown, and actionable recommendations

assertions.description: Report identifies the PromQL query expression (histogram_quantile with go_sched_latencies_seconds_bucket)
Report includes a breakdown of execution time by phase with duration numbers
Report identifies rollup computation / parallel data processing (~4.7s) as the main bottleneck
Report shows per-vmstorage node breakdown (at least 2 nodes)
Report mentions data volume metrics: samples, blocks, or bytes
Report includes at least one actionable optimization recommendation

evals.prompt: I have a query that takes over 5 seconds. Here's the trace — what should I change to make it faster?
evals.expected_output: Focused optimization advice identifying the high sample scan count and histogram bucket cardinality as primary issues, with specific suggestions like recording rules, shorter time ranges, or increased step

assertions.description: Report contains at least 2 distinct, concrete optimization suggestions
Report identifies the high raw sample scan count as a contributing factor
Report suggests recording rules or pre-aggregation as an optimization
Report identifies histogram bucket cardinality as contributing to high series count
